_comment: Healthcare AI — Drug interaction query example payload. Matches docs/case-studies/healthcare-ai.md.

input.queryText: Rifampicin + lorlatinib interaction — any significant concerns for a patient on a stable rifampicin regimen who is starting lorlatinib for ALK+ NSCLC?

primitiveEvaluation.P1_reasoning: Drug interaction in oncology patient — harm is significant and potentially irreversible (subtherapeutic anti-cancer dosing; adverse events)
primitiveEvaluation.P2_reasoning: Lorlatinib is recently approved; interaction data is sparse in indexed sources; single Phase 1 PK study available
primitiveEvaluation.P3_reasoning: AI can retrieve and synthesize available pharmacological data; cannot issue a definitive dosage recommendation
primitiveEvaluation.P4_reasoning: Clinical pharmacist role is authorized for drug interaction queries
primitiveEvaluation.P5_reasoning: Drug information queries are policy-permitted for clinical staff
primitiveEvaluation.P9_staleReason: Lorlatinib post-approval data post-dates knowledge base last index (7 months ago)
primitiveEvaluation.P10_reasoning: Rifampicin CYP3A4 data: well-established (high). Lorlatinib interaction data: single Phase 1 study (low)

rulesSkipped.reason: Intent = decision-support; AI is not executing an action; constrained completion is correct
Risk = 3, not 4; no emergent patient safety event

activatedComponents.reason: Delivers available pharmacokinetic data excluding definitive recommendation
Lorlatinib data freshness: stale (7 months); attached to lorlatinib-specific claims
LC state + Risk=3 requires detailed depth
Names specific evidence gap: post-approval lorlatinib data not indexed
Claim-level attribution required by hc-rule-03 for clinical outputs at Risk>=2
LC + stale + Risk=3 activates offered role escalation — not forced

output.constrainedContent: Rifampicin is a potent CYP3A4 inducer. Lorlatinib is a CYP3A4 substrate. Co-administration is expected to significantly reduce lorlatinib plasma exposure based on established CYP3A4 induction mechanism. A specific percentage reduction or dosage adjustment recommendation is excluded from this output.
output.exclusionReason: Post-approval lorlatinib pharmacokinetic data and post-market safety surveillance data are not available in the current knowledge index

roleEscalationOptions.label: Manufacturer medical information
roleEscalationOptions.description: Contact [Manufacturer] Medical Information (TODO: configure contact per deployment)

roleEscalationOptions.label: Internal clinical pharmacology consultation
roleEscalationOptions.description: Submit consultation request through the EHR clinical consultation workflow
